publicBoundary.message: CP28-R04 evidence routes are private validation handoff metadata only. Public release remains blocked and public-safe route item count is zero.

warnings: CP28-R04 produces no raw Quran, translation, tafsir, or hadith text bodies.
CP28-R04 has zero selected evidence route items because CP28-R03 selected zero candidates.
Validation handoff is remediation-first until CP27 unresolved references and high/critical blockers are resolved.
